summary: The diff shows modifications to the Portfolio component with image path updates and enhanced debugging, but critical requirements for file verification, Vite configuration, and comprehensive testing are not addressed in the provided changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify that all 120 gallery image files physically exist in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory with exact filenames matching the expected pattern
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of file existence verification. The diff shows code changes to Portfolio.tsx but does not include any file system checks, scripts, or documentation confirming that all 120 images (40 per category) physically exist in the correct directory.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify the Vite build configuration and public directory setup to ensure static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated are correctly served at runtime
missing_requirements.reason: No Vite configuration file changes are present in the diff. The requirement explicitly requires verification of Vite configuration, publicDir settings, and asset serving behavior, but no vite.config.ts/js modifications are shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Test image loading in both development and production builds to identify any environment-specific issues
missing_requirements.reason: No testing evidence, test scripts, or documentation showing that images were tested in both development and production environments. The diff only shows code changes without verification of actual runtime behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: Implementation uses .dim_1200x800.png suffix instead of plain .png as specified in requirements
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly specifies image naming convention as {category}-{number}.png (e.g., residential-1.png), but the implementation uses /assets/generated/residential-${num}.dim_1200x800.png with dimension suffix not mentioned in requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Selective image loading with hardcoded arrays instead of full 1-40 range for all categories
hallucinated_features.reason: The implementation uses residentialImageNumbers array with selective numbers (missing 16-20) instead of the required complete 1-40 range. Requirements specify all images 1-40 must be loaded for each category, with no mention of selective loading.

hallucinated_features.description: Reduced image counts contrary to requirement specifications
hallucinated_features.reason: Comment in diff states '30 residential, 3 commercial, 3 before-after' totaling 36 images, but REQ-52, REQ-53, and REQ-54 explicitly require 120 total images (40 per category). This represents a significant deviation from requirements.
